title: Forever 21 India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Forever 21 India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
